baselines.assumption: Rebuilds charged history through variable-time RMS composition.
baselines.limitation: Valid same-interface comparator; it pays inactive-sea rebuild cost.
baselines.name: loop_variable_time_rebuild

baselines.assumption: Uses generated activity predicates and all-marked extraction per level.
baselines.limitation: Does not get free active lists; must charge predicate generation.
baselines.name: all_marked_extraction_generated_predicate

baselines.assumption: Coarse partition followed by quantum best-arm identification proxy.
baselines.limitation: Only valid when the coarse partition exposes a same-output relation.
baselines.name: coarse_partition_plus_qbai

baselines.assumption: Runs charged finite-QPE precision on every arm independently.
baselines.limitation: Baseline is intentionally strong but loses active-history adaptivity.
baselines.name: independent_all_arm_qpe

baselines.assumption: Scans every arm at every charged level.
baselines.limitation: Valid but usually much larger than variable-time rebuild RMS.
baselines.name: serial_rebuild_scan

baselines.assumption: Assumes active histories are already materialized.
baselines.limitation: Invalid under no-free-QRAM interface; tracked as a forbidden collapse.
baselines.name: free_history_qram_layered

raw_records.proof_obligation: Instantiate published loop composition, exact/approximate k-minimum, QBAI, and variable-time search theorems with formal assumptions.

summary.interpretation: known-composition frontier audit; open gates remain proof obligations and failed gates reject the candidate setting

does_not_support: a novelty theorem against all published quantum compositions
supports: same-interface audit of encoded known-composition baselines
explicit rejection of free-history QRAM baselines under the declared no-free-QRAM interface

notes: Composition-frontier audit for the no-free-QRAM unknown-boundary candidate.
Passing an encoded frontier is not a novelty theorem; it only records that the currently encoded known-composition baselines did not match the candidate under the declared tolerance.
